Patch Set 1:

Hello, with this typo fix from Jakub, SDC WFD FE doesn't work anymore...
Do we need it or can we remove the mountpoint?
Assignee deleted: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Assignee added: Christophe Closset <christophe.closset@intl.att.com>

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

The mount is required, I think that a simple change will make the deployment happy
